headline: Wells Fargo Grant And Consent Order Exit Reframe Housing And Risk Story
summary: Wells Fargo (NYSE:WFC) is supporting the Norman Commons affordable apartment complex in Austin through a significant grant. The bank is co sponsoring the project as part of its broader focus on housing access and community investment. Wells Fargo has closed its final outstanding consent order, removing a key regulatory constraint. For a large U.S. bank like Wells Fargo, lending, payments, and consumer banking sit alongside community development efforts such as affordable housing support...

headline: Wells Fargo, Evercore ISI Trim Extra Space Storage (EXR) Targets Ahead of Q1
summary: Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE:EXR) is included among the 10 Fastest Growing Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. On April 16, Wells Fargo lowered its price recommendation on Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE:EXR) to $148 from $150. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm said it is becoming more cautious on storage REITs […]
